title: Decision Helper
desc: Helps make complex decisions better by breaking them down qualitatively.

title: Finance
desc: Log spending, set budgets, see where the money's actually going. Public demo runs entirely in your browser with CSV import/export.

title: Emotional Well-being
desc: Rate emotional needs by priority and how met they are. Surfaces highest-leverage needs, domain gaps, and which sources (self / friends / romantic / activities / career / other) are over- or under-contributing.

title: Time Tracker
desc: Clock in/out by category with breaks and stopwatch laps, a Pomodoro timer with a reward-minutes bank, and per-session ratings (mood / productivity / enjoyment) plus activity-type tagging. Log tab shows category-stacked daily charts with date-range presets. Syncs to a private Google Sheet.

title: Qualitative Coding
desc: Personal qualitative-coding tool: nested code tree, per-doc metadata, interpretive themes, a grading rubric, a cross-project Explore view, Markdown notes, and Google Drive sync. Exports canonical JSON and Markdown for AI-comparison work.
